since_last: 66% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.99%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC -4.28% · Gold -3.27% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 66% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.99%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.99%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.51%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at +12.86%
cards.body: Leaders: SMR +12.86%, INTC +10.73%, CEVA +10.71%, SMCI +10.55%, MU +10.35%. Laggards: INOD -6.90%, SPCX -5.37%, IBM -4.86%, WDAY -3.97%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.37% at $181.52
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.37% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
